last_skill_context.name: Agent Phone Call Skill
last_skill_context.description: A skill enabling the AI agent to get a phone number and perform tasks via phone calls (booking, inquiry, customer service).
last_skill_context.trigger_context: Use when the human needs to make/answer a phone call.
last_skill_context.implementation_notes: Requires external API credentials (e.g., Twilio) for actual execution.

context_metadata.status: Credentials stored successfully for future phone call simulations/executions.
